overview: Dr. Arman Kabir's Care is a comprehensive bilingual (English/Bangla) patient management and doctor portal for clinics and hospitals, covering OPD and IPD workflows, prescriptions, ward rounds, hospital management, and a public landing page.
features: 9-role authentication (Admin, Consultant, MO, Intern, Nurse, Registrar, Reception, Patient and more) with role-based dashboards
Patient registration with 17-tab profile (vitals, prescriptions, SOAP notes, investigations, appointments, timeline, chat, and more)
Daily ward rounds with 3-step SOAP flow (Intern draft → MO review → Consultant finalization)
Bed management with typed beds (ICU/HDU/Cabin), reservation expiry timer, and discharge checklist
Hospital payments with 5 tabs, invoice-before-payment, revenue charts, WhatsApp invoice sharing
Investigation payment with walk-in form, rate.csv upload, and downloadable branded receipts
Clinical alerts (Sepsis, AKI, NEWS2, hypoglycemia) auto-calculated from vitals
Fully admin-editable public landing page with interactive clinic maps, appointment booking, and bilingual toggle
Educational classroom with Announcements, Lecture Notes, Video Lectures, and Picture Gallery tabs
Offline-first with canister cloud sync, build-time canister ID embedding for reliable Vercel deployments
